book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: After the reading of the foregoing epistle, the most reverend bishops cried out: This is the faith of the fathers, this is the faith of the Apostles.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: So we all believe, thus the orthodox believe.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Anathema to him who does not thus believe.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Peter has spoken thus through Leo.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Piously and truly did Leo teach, so taught Cyril.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Everlasting be the memory of Cyril.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Leo and Cyril taught the same thing, anathema to him who does not so believe.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Those of us who are orthodox thus believe.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: This is the faith of the fathers.

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Why were not these things read at Ephesus [i.e. at the heretical synod held there]?

verses.book: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
verses.text: These are the things Dioscorus hid away.
